title: Dedee
writer: Henri La Barthe, Jacques Sigurd, Yves Allégret
actors: Bernard Blier, Simone Signoret, Marcello Pagliero
plot: Dedee is a prostitute who works in Monsieur Rene's nightclub on Antwerp's harbour. The porter is Marco, her pimp. Dedee is not happy until she meets Francesco, an Italian sailor. They fall in love and Dedee starts to dream about e...
